hero.title: Hi, I'm Taehyun — frontend engineer
hero.desc:
My strength is nailing down what to build and why, then driving products from 0 to 1 all the way to launch.
Lately I've extended that approach with AI — building and running my own apps end to end.

pillars.nowBody: 2 apps live on the App Store — built and run end to end, solo. Now expanding into automation (4 in development).

about.title: How I work
about.desc: Code should fit in one engineer's head.<n></n>When a pattern is clear I automate it; when it isn't, I form a hypothesis and validate with data.<n></n>I treat UI as a function of state, and I lean on AI heavily but decide what to build and why myself.

resumePage.title: Resume
resumePage.summaryDesc: Frontend engineer with 5 years of experience. My strength is nailing down what to build and why, then driving products from 0 to 1 all the way to launch — and I've recently extended that approach with AI, building and running my own apps end to end.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.subtitle: Technical decisions, trade-offs, failures, and what I learned
